name: EuiCollapsibleNav
description: Collapsible side navigation panel for app-level navigation.

children.description: ReactNode to render as this component's content

size.description:
Defines the width of the panel.
Pass a predefined size of `s | m | l`, or pass any number/string compatible with the CSS `width` attribute

side.description:
Which side of the window to attach to.
The `left` option should only be used for navigation.

maxWidth.description:
Sets the max-width of the panel,
set to `true` to use the default size,
set to `false` to not restrict the width,
set to a number for a custom width in px,
set to a string for a custom width in custom measurement.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

minWidth.description:
Sets the minimum width of the panel.
Especially useful when set with `resizable = true`.

onResize.description: Optional callback that fires when the flyout is resized.

paddingSize.description: Customize the padding around the content of the flyout header, body and footer

ref.type: string | ((instance: HTMLDivElement) => void) | RefObject<HTMLDivElement> | ((instance: HTMLElement) => void) | RefObject<HTMLElement>

closeButtonProps.description: Extends EuiButtonIconProps onto the close button

onClose.description: A required callback function fired when the flyout is closed.

ownFocus.description: Adds an EuiOverlayMask and wraps in an EuiPortal

hideCloseButton.description: Hides the default close button. You must provide another close button somewhere within the flyout.

maskProps.description: Adjustments to the EuiOverlayMask that is added when `ownFocus = true`

outsideClickCloses.description:
Forces this interaction on the mask overlay or body content.
Defaults depend on `ownFocus` and `type` values

pushMinBreakpoint.description: Named breakpoint (`xs` through `xl`) for customizing the minimum window width to enable the `push` type

pushAnimation.description: Enables a slide in animation on push flyouts

hasChildBackground.description: When the flyout is used as a child in a managed flyout session, setting `true` gives the shaded background style.

focusTrapProps.description:
Object of props passed to EuiFocusTrap.
`shards` specifies an array of elements that will be considered part of the flyout, preventing the flyout from being closed when clicked.
`closeOnMouseup` will delay the close callback, allowing time for external toggle buttons to handle close behavior.
`returnFocus` defines the return focus behavior and provides the possibility to check the available target element or opt out of the behavior in favor of manually returning focus

includeFixedHeadersInFocusTrap.description:
By default, EuiFlyout will consider any fixed `EuiHeader`s that sit alongside or above the EuiFlyout
as part of the flyout's focus trap. This prevents focus fighting with interactive elements
within fixed headers.

Set this to `false` if you need to disable this behavior for a specific reason.

includeSelectorInFocusTrap.description: Specify additional css selectors to include in the focus trap.

flyoutMenuProps.description:
Props for the flyout menu to have one rendered in the flyout.
If used, the close button will be automatically hidden, as the flyout menu has its own close button.

resizable.description: Whether the flyout should be resizable.

as.description: The HTML element to render as the flyout container.

session.description:
Controls the way the session is managed for this flyout.
- `start`: Creates a new flyout session. Use this for the main flyout.
- `inherit`: Inherits an existing session if one is active, otherwise functions as a standard flyout.
- `never`: Disregards session management and always functions as a standard flyout.

When the `session` prop is undefined (not set), the flyout will automatically inherit from
a parent flyout if it's nested inside one. Otherwise, it defaults to `never`.

Check out [EuiFlyout session management](https://eui.elastic.co/docs/components/containers/flyout/session-management)
documentation to learn more.

onActive.description: Callback fired when the flyout becomes active/visible, which may happen programmatically from history navigation.

isDocked.description: Keeps navigation flyout visible and push `<body>` content via padding

dockedBreakpoint.description: Named breakpoint (`xs` through `xl`) for customizing the minimum window width to enable docking

button.description: Button for controlling visible state of the nav

showButtonIfDocked.description: Keeps the display of toggle button when in docked state

example: <EuiCollapsibleNav as="nav" side="left" size={320} paddingSize="none" pushMinBreakpoint="l" dockedBreakpoint="l" closeButtonPosition="outside" includeFixedHeadersInFocusTrap outsideClickCloses ownFocus isOpen>Collapsible nav content</EuiCollapsibleNav>
